name: Dam
description: You are standing on the top of Flood Control Dam #3, which was quite a tourist attraction in times far distant. There are paths to the north, south, and west, and a scramble down. Behind the dam lies a wide reservoir basin. A control panel sits here with a large metal bolt mounted on it, and directly above the bolt is a small green plastic bubble, as if the structure expects you to care about levels and levers.
